zh.Hempstead, Benenden, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特貝嫩登
zh.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard de Guildford於1280年出生在英國英格蘭肯特洛爾文登。她於1300年與Richard de Guilford在英國肯特洛爾文登結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard de Guildford于1280年出生在英国英格兰肯特洛爾文登。她于1300年与Richard de Guilford在英国肯特洛爾文登结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Guildford
meanings: Gild-ford, from gild, a guild, society, or club where money was paid for support, and ford, a ford, meaning a stock ford

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard de Guildford was born in 1280, in Rolvenden, Kent, England, United Kingdom. She married Richard de Guilford in 1300, in Rolvenden, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard de Guildford est née en 1280, à Rolvenden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Richard de Guilford en 1300, à Rolvenden, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard de Guildford wurde 1280 in Rolvenden, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat 1300 in Rolvenden, Kent, England Richard de Guilford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard de Guildford è nata il nel 1280 nel Rolvenden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Richard de Guilford nel 1300, nel Rolvenden, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard de Guildfordは1280年にイギリスイギリスケントロルベンデンで生まれた。1300年にイギリスケントロルベンデンでRichard de Guilfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard de Guildford(은)는 1280년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 롤븐든에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1300년 영국 켄트 롤븐든에서 Richard de Guilford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard de Guildford nasceu em 1280, em Rolvenden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Richard de Guilford em 1300, em Rolvenden, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard de Guildford родилась в 1280 г. в местности ролвенден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Guilford в 1300 г. в местности ролвенден, кэнт, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard de Guildford nació en 1280, en Rolvenden, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Richard de Guilford en 1300, en Rolvenden, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
